summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-9, REQ-10, REQ-11) with strong coverage. A BottomTabBar with alert badge is added, Navigation is hidden on mobile, MobilePageHeader is added to all authenticated pages, pages use single-column layouts, DetectionHistoryTable collapses to cards on mobile, TrafficInputForm uses full-width inputs, and the Login page is redesigned as a mobile splash screen. A few minor acceptance criteria details are partially addressed or ambiguous based on the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: All stat cards on the Dashboard stack vertically in a single column on screens narrower than 640px
missing_requirements.reason: StatisticsCards uses 'grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4', meaning it shows 2 columns even on narrow screens below 640px, not a single column as required by the acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: Feature pills (Traffic Analysis, Threat Detection, Secure Access) on the Login page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for a logo, app name, tagline, and a prominent Sign In button on the Login page. The decorative feature pills were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Desktop sticky top navigation bar retained as hidden sm:flex in Navigation.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirement says to replace or hide the top navigation bar in favor of the bottom tab bar. Navigation.tsx still renders a full desktop nav bar visible on sm+ screens, which is additional behavior beyond what was requested for the mobile-first redesign.
